posts.author: Kim3 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Updating multiple items at once?!?!!?
I think this feature is MUCH needed! Sometimes we have multiple items that need to be updated with the same content word for word.

I like the way we can select multiple lines and change the date column, status column, drop down column, etc and it will update all of the selected lines.

I think it would be AMAZING if that feature also applied to the updates. Meaning I could select 6 lines, hit the update box, and all of the 6 selected lines would have the same update I entered.

Some times we end up copy & pasting and then hitting into each individual line to enter the same update for different items.

What are you trying to achieve

With my suggested additions, I’m trying to achieve a quicker turn around in the updates feature. I work fast - sometimes my brain goes faster than my fingers can type.
There are a lot of AMAZING features on Monday.com that give that sense of one click and done. I think there are ways we can add that into the update feature. It’s a big part of my company. We document / take notes on everything. We even enforce what we call an “update minimum” where members of our team have to meet a quota and perform a certain amount of updates per week on their files.
